parg.one: Our story began when we decided to use our passion and vision, along with our work experience to share one idea and one dream
parg.Tow: The Idea… is very simple but unique, it is about creating a new combination of Marketing and Technology Solutions to help your business to grow smoothly.
parg.Three: The Dream… started by establishing SoluSpot, a startup company based in Cairo, Egypt willing to work globally.

parg.one: Serving Solutions simply… is our mission and passion.
parg.Tow: Your growth is our goal…working with you to understand your objectives and budget, tailoring our services to suit your needs.
parg.Three: Implementing our knowledge for your success… ensuring that every part of your marketing plan is connected together, mapped to your objectives and achieving your goals.
